name: Aegean Artichoke & Penne Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons fresh basil (or 1 teaspoon dried basil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from artichokes. Peel away the tough outer leaves to reveal yellow-green hearts. Cut artichokes into quarters. Combine 1/4 cup lemon juice with 2 cups water in a medium bowl. Add artichokes to the lemon water and toss gently to prevent discoloration. Drain thoroughly.
Steam artichokes until tender, about 20 minutes. Chill.
2. Bring 2 quarts water to a rapid boil in a large pot. Add 1 teaspoon salt. Add penne pasta and cook until al dente, about 10 minutes. Drain and rinse with cold water.
3. To make salad dressing: In a food processor or blender, combine tomato juice, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, parsley, basil, salt, and pepper. Puree for 30 seconds.
4. Toss together artichokes, penne, capers, olives, and feta cheese in a large bowl. Pour dressing over and toss well.
